name: AskUserQuestion

questions.description: 包含问题数组的JSON字符串，每个问题有id、question、options和multiSelect设置。

description_zh: 从用户收集结构化多选题答案。提供一个或多个带选项的问题，并在适合多选时设置multiSelect。
description_en: Collect structured multiple-choice answers from the user. Provide one or more questions with options, and set multiSelect when multi-select is appropriate.
examples_zh: 询问单个问题: questions="[{\"id\":\"q1\",\"question\":\"选择选项:\",\"options\":[\"A\",\"B\"]}]"
